---
title: "Levelling Lecture: Genome sequencing, sequencing technologies, and data types"
author: "Enza Colonna"
event: "EMBO Practical Course – Pangenomics"
date: "June 2026"
duration: "60 minutes"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: false
    link-external-newwindow: true
    css: styles.css
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: false
    filters:
      - filters/small-format-tables.lua
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{xcolor}
        \usepackage{sectsty}
        \definecolor{headingteal}{HTML}{1F5F78}
        \sectionfont{\color{headingteal}}
        \subsectionfont{\color{headingteal}}
        \subsubsectionfont{\color{headingteal}}

---

{{< include handout/00-learning-objectives.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/01-why-sequencing-matters.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/02-molecule-to-data.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/03-short-reads.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/04-long-reads.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/05-complementary-data.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/06-data-formats.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/07-technology-comparison.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/08-decision-framework.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/09-common-pitfalls.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/10-participant-prompts.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/11-closing-synthesis.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/12-sources.qmd >}}

{{< include handout/13-production.qmd >}}
